restaurants.name: Cedar & Spice (Halal Certified)
restaurants.notes: Certified halal kitchen; no pork or alcohol on premises. Private room suitable for executive dinners.

restaurants.name: Green Leaf Bistro
restaurants.notes: Halal-sourced poultry and beef available on request; separate prep area. Offers mocktails and fresh juices only.

restaurants.name: Harbor View Kitchen
restaurants.notes: Not suitable for no-alcohol requirement; listed for completeness.

restaurants.name: Spice Route Kitchen
restaurants.notes: Halal-friendly menu with clear labeling; no alcohol served.

gifts.name: Hamilton Leather Notebook
gifts.notes: Executive-quality leather notebook; can be embossed with initials and our logo (subtle).

gifts.name: City Artisan Date Selection
gifts.notes: Premium Medjool and Ajwa dates presented in a carved wooden box; culturally appropriate.

gifts.name: Premium Tea Sampler (No Alcohol)
gifts.notes: Assorted single-origin black, green, and herbal teas; no alcohol; includes brewing guide.

gifts.name: Crystal Wine Set
gifts.notes: Elegant crystal decanter and glasses; not appropriate for no-alcohol guests.

gifts.name: Local Museum Coffee Table Book
gifts.notes: High-quality photography book featuring local architecture and history.

prayer_spaces.name: Downtown Islamic Center
prayer_spaces.notes: Prayer times posted daily; available for Dhuhr/Asr/Maghrib; parking available.

prayer_spaces.name: Quiet Reflection Room - HQ 6F
prayer_spaces.wudu_facilities: Nearby restrooms with dedicated sink area
prayer_spaces.notes: Can be reserved in 30–45 minute blocks for prayer; signage available for privacy.

transport.notes: Discreet drivers, accommodates carry-ons; chilled bottled water and phone chargers; no alcohol stocked.
